validation_domains.name: post_build_audit_consumption
validation_domains.purpose: Confirm BLOQUE 4 post-build audit is present, exact, synced, and BUILT_POST_AUDITED.

validation_domains.name: source_module_integrity
validation_domains.purpose: Validate py_compile, deterministic self-check, no forbidden imports, no network or LLM usage.

validation_domains.name: test_harness_integrity
validation_domains.purpose: Validate test domain coverage, production-real threshold, specific suite, and subsystem suite.

validation_domains.name: semantic_segment_contract
validation_domains.purpose: Validate segment_id, source_hash, offsets, hashes, extraction safety, stable ordering.

validation_domains.name: rule_candidate_contract
validation_domains.purpose: Validate rule contract completeness, evidence refs, priority, polarity, capability flags.

validation_domains.name: intent_candidate_contract
validation_domains.purpose: Validate intent contract completeness, request-vs-authorization separation, action_allowed false.

validation_domains.name: dangerous_capability_blocking
validation_domains.purpose: Validate execution/manual/brain/n8n/webhook/publishing/CAPA9 requests are detected but blocked.

validation_domains.name: specific_capability_match_priority
validation_domains.purpose: Validate longest/specific capability matching for validation plan/map, post-build audit, gate closure.

validation_domains.name: anti_leak_hash_only_reports
validation_domains.purpose: Validate public JSON reports contain no raw semantic text, no forbidden text fields, no fake secrets.

validation_domains.name: deterministic_outputs
validation_domains.purpose: Validate build_all_artifact_texts, validate-outputs, canonical JSON, final newline, no BOM.

validation_domains.name: no_mutation_guard
validation_domains.purpose: Validate input snapshots are deep copied and before/after hashes remain identical.

validation_domains.name: block5_remains_blocked
validation_domains.purpose: Validate conflict detector, BLOQUE 5 blueprint/build/validation remain fully blocked.

validation_domains.name: traceability_and_manifest
validation_domains.purpose: Validate manifest/seal markers, FIX-2 audit continuity, artifact list, and next safe step.

validation_domains.name: no_touch_boundaries
validation_domains.purpose: Validate no manual/current, manual/historical, brain, reports/brain, registry or manifest writes.

validation_domains.name: validation_lifecycle_safety
validation_domains.purpose: Validate map defines validation only and does not execute validation or gate closure.
